title: Khanmigo teacher focused AI activities
description: Exercise for Khanmigo Teacher Focused AI Activities
topic_path: Welcome to Khanmigo, your new AI teaching assistant

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is one of the features of Khanmigo that helps teachers assess student understanding at the end of a lesson?
**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Creating warm-up questions
Developing lesson hooks
Writing exit ticket questions
Reviewing videos

assessment_items.question_content:
**What feature of Khanmigo allows teachers to create lesson plans aligned to their curriculum and student needs?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Class Snapshot
Lesson Plan
Discussion Prompts
Recommend Assignments

assessment_items.question_content:
**How can teachers modify the lesson plans created by Khanmigo?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: By using the "Ask Khanmigo" action bubble to make edits.
By manually rewriting the entire lesson plan.
By sending an email request to Khan Academy.
By attending a Khan Academy workshop.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What options do teachers have after finalizing their lesson plans with Khanmigo?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: They can only view it online.
They can print, export to PDF, or send it to Google Drive.
They must submit it for review.
They can delete it permanently.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is the purpose of the Information Text Generator tool in Khanmigo?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: To generate precise instructions for building models.
To create informational text passages tailored to specific grade levels and topics.
To compose poems summarizing class lessons.
To create multiple choice assessments.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How does the Multiple Choice Assessment feature benefit teachers?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It allows teachers to generate assessments quickly, tailored to specific content areas.
It automatically grades students' assessments.
It eliminates the need for any teacher input or customization.
It creates detailed lesson plans for teachers.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is the purpose of the Real-World Context Generator in Khanmigo?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: To generate multiple choice questions.
To demonstrate real-life applications for academic concepts.
To produce detailed lesson plans.
To assess student understanding through quizzes.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How does the Leveler Feature assist teachers?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: By creating games for classroom engagement.
By adjusting text complexity to a given reading level.
By generating automatic grading systems.
By providing real-time feedback to students.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What does the 'Make it Relevant' feature do?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It translates text into different languages.
It simplifies complex mathematical problems.
It transforms content topics into relevant scenarios.
It schedules classes based on student availability.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is the primary benefit of using the Rubric Generator in Khanmigo?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: To automatically grade student assignments.
To set clear, objective grading criteria for assignments.
To translate rubrics into different languages automatically.
To create complex mathematical problems.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How does the Rubric Generator enhance the rubric creation process?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: By allowing teachers to collaborate with Khanmigo to customize performance levels and criteria.
By limiting teacher input to ensure standardization.
By generating rubrics without teacher interaction.
By focusing solely on the final grading without feedback.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is the primary function of the Class Snapshot feature in Khanmigo?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: To automatically complete student assignments.
To provide a detailed overview of class performance and student needs.
To translate classroom instructions into multiple languages.
To create lesson plans for teachers.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How often should students engage with Khan Academy courses?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: At least 30 minutes each week.
Once a month.
Daily for several hours.
Only during exams.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What should teachers do with the information provided by the Class Snapshot?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Ignore the data and continue with planned lessons.
Use the insights to tailor instruction and support individual student needs.
Share the data publicly to motivate students.
Use the data to penalize students who are underperforming.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What additional support does Khanmigo offer through the Class Snapshot feature?
**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Forming small groups and listing students that should be celebrated
Providing technical support for computer issues.
Organizing field trips for students.
Managing the school's administrative tasks.
